scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c yellow,blue "cd apps/web && pnpm dev" "cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload"
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c yellow,blue "cd apps/web && pnpm preview" "cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn app.main:app"
scripts.format:read: (cd apps/web && pnpm exec prettier --check .) && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff format --check .)
scripts.format:write: (cd apps/web && pnpm exec prettier --write .) && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff format .)
scripts.lint:read: (cd apps/web && pnpm run lint) && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .)
scripts.lint:write: (cd apps/web && pnpm exec eslint --fix .) && (cd apps/api && uv run ruff check --fix .)
